title: clitandropsis novoguineensis
intro: Clitandropsis novoguineensis, also known as the New Guinea cedar, is a species of tree native to the island of New Guinea. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Clitandropsis novoguineensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Clitandropsis novoguineensis, often in the form of tea or infusions, are used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy.
